General.Name: Gudou Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Gudou Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates and manages hot spring resort and hotel facilities in the People's Republic of China. It operates in two segments, Property Development, and Hotel and Resort Operations. The company develops and sells tourism properties, such as villas, apartments, studio flats, commercial units, and carpark spaces, as well as operates entertainment business; and various leisure and recreational facilities, including hot spring facilities, hotels, commercial stores, food and beverages outlets, recreational waterpark, spa centre, conference centre, parks, tourist attractions, and other facilities in the resort. It also provides consultancy and/or management services to leisure hotels and resorts, and other hot spring resort operators; and property management services. The company was formerly known as Gudou International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Gudou Holdings Limited in October 2015. Gudou Holdings Limited was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Jiangmen, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: Gudou Hot Spring Resort, Jiangmen, China
